response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has strong backend and distributed systems expertise, including event-driven architectures and microservices, demonstrated at Meta and Dunnhumby. His experience with AI-agent infrastructure at Google is promising, though limited to MCP and developer tooling rather than full-scale agentic AI systems. However, his resume lacks direct fintech experience, multi-agent AI production deployments, or leadership in scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people. His fintech-adjacent roles are minimal, and his regulatory/compliance experience is not evident.
strengths: Strong backend and distributed systems expertise (event-driven, microservices, real-time systems)
Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling at Google
Proven track record of scaling engineering teams and adopting modern practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: Limited direct experience with fintech infrastructure, credit systems, or embedded finance
No clear evidence of building or operating multi-agent AI systems in production
Lack of demonstrated leadership in scaling engineering teams to 30+ people or governance over external delivery partners
